creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-03-22 14:11:48 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/p5-RT-Client-REST Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  RT::Client::REST is a set of object-oriented Perl modules
  which provide interface between Perl scripts and RT
  (an industrial-grade ticketing system) using REST protocol.
  Most of the features have been implemented and
  tested with rt 3.6.0 and later.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/RT-Client-REST/
  
  PR:             ports/110675
  Submitted by:   Sergei Vyshenski <svysh@pn.sinp.msu.ru>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1752    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +38 -0     ports/www/p5-RT-Client-REST/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/p5-RT-Client-REST/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/www/p5-RT-Client-REST/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/www/p5-RT-Client-REST/pkg-plist (new)
